name: operator can disable a single pr-corpus cross-loop emission target via profile config
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'pr_corpus_cross_loop:\n  emit_to: [standards, rubric]\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/cross-loop/emit.sh" --profile profiles/p.yaml --target compliance --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'target=compliance disabled=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
